expectations.evidence: The CSV report contains only 5 items (2.1.1, 1.1.1, 1.3.1, 4.1.1, 2.4.7). The HTML report summary confirms '5 검토 항목 수' (5 reviewed items). Far short of the required 33 KWCAG 2.2 items.

expectations.text: Detected div onClick without keyboard accessibility
expectations.evidence: CSV item 1 (KWCAG 2.1.1): '<div onClick={handleClick}>에 tabIndex·role·onKeyDown이 없어 키보드 사용자는 클릭 이벤트를 실행할 수 없음. 마우스 없이 이 기능 접근 불가.' Verdict: 실패 (fail).

expectations.text: Detected duplicate id='stat-card' when rendered in a list
expectations.evidence: CSV item 4 (KWCAG 4.1.1): 'id="stat-card"가 하드코딩되어 동일 페이지에 컴포넌트가 여러 번 렌더링될 때 중복 id 발생. HTML 명세 위반이며 aria-labelledby 등 보조 기술 기능 오동작 유발.' Verdict: 실패 (fail).

expectations.text: Each issue is mapped to a specific KWCAG item number
expectations.evidence: All 5 items in the CSV and HTML report are mapped to specific KWCAG 2.2 numbers: 2.1.1 키보드 사용 보장, 1.1.1 적절한 대체 텍스트 제공, 1.3.1 정보와 관계, 4.1.1 마크업 오류 방지, 2.4.7 포커스 가시성.

expectations.text: Fix recommendations are provided for each found issue
expectations.evidence: All 5 items have populated '수정 가이드' (fix guide) columns in both CSV and HTML. Examples: item 1 recommends replacing <div> with <button> or adding role='button' tabIndex={0} onKeyDown; item 4 recommends useId() Hook for unique IDs.

expectations.text: Lighthouse-mapped items show verdict method as Lighthouse when dev server is running
expectations.evidence: All 5 items in the CSV show '판정방식' (verdict method) as '코드 검토' (code review). No item uses 'Lighthouse' as the verdict method. The without_skill configuration does not use the skill's Lighthouse integration.

expectations.text: Playwright-target items (A-10) show verdict method as Playwright when dev server is running
expectations.evidence: No items in the CSV or HTML report use 'Playwright' as the verdict method. All 5 items show '코드 검토' (code review). The without_skill configuration does not use the skill's Playwright integration.
